column1: # Ashfoot staging cards — hit-and-fade mobility + salvage flavor

column3: description
Years breathing cinder taught your lungs to laugh at it. Ignore difficult terrain from ash, smoke, or rubble; gain a FRAME save against airborne debuffs.
A glance at a downed foe tells you which plate pops loose first. After any enemy falls, mark one piece of their gear as salvageable on an EDGE check.

column1: # === L3 Skirmish Specialist (4) — mobility as a weapon ===

column3: Boot-heel grinds a plume of ashlands grit into an enemy's faceplate. EDGE strike; the target loses sightlines until their next turn.
Move full speed without leaving tracks or triggering overwatch. Enemies that prepared an attack against you lose it.
Snag an enemy's belt, armor lip, or weapon strap as you pass. Shift them one step as you continue your move; they spend AP to chase or let it go.
Thread the gap two enemies leave between them. Move through a contested space without provoking reactions and make a free Basic Attack against one on exit.

column1: # === L3 Formation Anchor (4) — holds ground when others break ===

column3: Drive your heels into the ash and refuse to move. Until your next turn, forced movement against you fails and allies behind you gain cover.
Step into the space an ally is about to vacate. Swap positions with an adjacent ally and intercept the next attack aimed at them.
Stand in a chokepoint and dare them through. Any enemy that enters your zone this round suffers a FRAME-contested stagger.
A bark in the old ashlands cadence. Allies within earshot clear one fear or rout effect and gain a reaction this round.

column1: # === L3 Salvage Innovator (4) — turns wreckage into tools ===

column3: Kneel over debris and lash it into something that works. Spend a turn crafting a single-use tool (shield, grapnel, smoke cannister) from a nearby wreck.
Toss a jerry-rigged charge to an ally mid-fight. Pass one salvage token or improvised item to any ally in line of sight.
Wrench armor off a stunned or downed foe and strap it on the nearest ally. Target ally gains temporary armor until next round.
You remember where their power lines run. Target one mechanized enemy; their next augmentation or device-based action misfires.
Your feet find the fight's rhythm; dust rises with you. For the round, every attack you land grants a free 1-square reposition.
You kicked through three wrecks on the way in. Draw two improvised items from ambient salvage and arm yourself or an adjacent ally.
Choose the terrain they underestimated. Reshape one zone into advantageous ashlands terrain; allies gain cover, enemies lose reactions while inside.
Seven strikes across seven footprints, none of them holding still. Make up to three Basic Attacks against different targets, moving between each; enemies cannot react.
When targeted by any attack, declare you were already leaving. Cancel the attack, move your full speed, and leave behind a dust cloud that blocks pursuit.
Lock shields and memory with every ally in sight. Until your next turn, damage dealt to any anchored ally is split evenly across the formation.
Bark a withdrawal order that lets everyone else disengage. All allies in range move freely without provoking; you become the only valid target but gain a massive FRAME bonus.
Drag three wrecks together and weld them working in sixty seconds of held breath. Create a battlefield emplacement (turret, barricade, or charging station) your allies can operate.
Rip the armaments off a fallen foe and turn them loose at their friends. Reload one allied ranged weapon and grant it the elite attack profile of the last enemy to drop.

Every low-caste who fell before you rises in the dust at your back. Choose: become untargetable for one round as you fade through the ashlands, or summon the memory of fallen Ashfoot kin as shadow-allies who fight one full round beside you.
